name: Meat and Potato Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare enough instant mashed potatoes to serve 4 as per package instructions.
2. Prepare the basic meat loaf, but spread the mixture into an ungreased baking pan that is 9 X 9 X 2 inches or 8 X 8 X 2 inches.
3. Omit the catsup and decrease the baking time to 40 to 50 minutes.
4. Drain off any excess fat.
5. Spread the hot potatoes evenly over the meat in the pan.
6. Sprinkle with the shredded cheese.
7. Bake until the cheese is melted, about 2 to 4 minutes.
8. Serve hot on a slightly heated platter.
